description_long: This is a rectangular keyboard with a slightly rounded, off-white plastic chassis and a dark gray keyset. The keys are arranged in a standard grid, with three larger, cream-colored keys positioned on the upper right side, possibly for special functions. The main key area features a typical alphanumeric layout, and the keys appear to be made of plastic with white labeling. The keyboard has a solid, blocky build, reminiscent of vintage or industrial models, and lacks any visible branding or decorative elements. The surface is smooth and hard, with a matte finish that reduces glare. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached to the device.
description: A vintage-style, off-white keyboard with a dark gray keyset and three large cream-colored function keys. The design is solid, blocky, and utilitarian, with a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: The keyboard is seen from the left side, showing the profile of the keyset and the three large cream-colored keys on the far side.
description_view_1: The front view displays the full key layout, including the three large cream-colored keys on the right and the main alphanumeric section.
description_view_2: The right side view highlights the three large cream-colored keys and the sloped profile of the keyboard.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the plain, off-white back of the keyboard with no visible ports or features.
attribute_key_layout: Full-size with function keys, no numpad
